rationale: Tests whether a drop in fractal dimension reliably identifies the onset of a sustained trend for leverage entry.
expected_failure_mode: Fractal dimension can be unstable on daily data, producing noisy non-actionable state changes.
stop_conditions: hybrid candidate fails Gold all-era economics or Future Confidence
candidate fails the authority certification gates
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Signal flips more than 3 times a week on average.
Cumulative share accumulation falls behind the moving-average benchmark.
